note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 1.2 cm x 0.7 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 50% slough, 50% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Nutritional consult ordered.

Pt seen for wound eval. Abscess Right cervical measures aprx 1.2 x 0.7cm, depth 0.2cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R ankle 0.7x0.4, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
